name: Stuffed Peppers
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut peppers in half from top to stem to bottom and discard seeds and membranes.
2. Blanch peppers in boiling water for 3 minutes, then drain and set aside.
3. Mix the remaining ingredients in a saucepan and simmer until hot and bubbly.
4. Stuff peppers with bean mixture.
5. Place peppers in a 13 X 9 X 2 baking dish.
6. Bake covered at 350°F for 35 to 40 minutes.
